export class TurfCaptureProgressParser{constructor(){this._data={vId:0,active:false,percent:0,contested:false,attackerGangId:0,defenderGangId:0,secondsLeft:0};}flush(){this._data={vId:0,active:false,percent:0,contested:false,attackerGangId:0,defenderGangId:0,secondsLeft:0};return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;// must match server-side TurfCaptureProgressComposer
this._data.vId=wrapper.readInt();this._data.active=wrapper.readBoolean();this._data.percent=wrapper.readInt();this._data.contested=wrapper.readBoolean();this._data.attackerGangId=wrapper.readInt();this._data.defenderGangId=wrapper.readInt();this._data.secondsLeft=wrapper.readInt();return true;}get data(){return this._data;}}
